name: Nicolásek
description: Nicolas: straight light-blond hair, bright blue eyes, white T-shirt with two red horizontal stripes, mid-blue denim shorts, white sneakers with grey soles, tall boy

name: Valentýnka
description: Valentýna: wavy light-blonde hair with large pink fabric bow, sky-blue eyes, yellow dress with small white flower print and white collar, white sandals, small girl — the top of her head reaches Nicolas's shoulders

name: Táta Jan
description: Jan: adult man with short dark-brown hair (fuller on top, slightly receding only at the temples with a widow's peak), short brown stubble beard, warm dark-brown eyes, strong jaw, big warm open smile, navy-blue polo shirt with white horizontal stripes, navy shorts, white sneakers, tall athletic build

name: Máma Jana
description: Jana: adult woman with very long straight blonde hair, blue-grey eyes, gentle smile, lilac-purple hoodie with drawstrings, black leggings, slim medium height

name: Pes Archie
description: Archie: friendly Staffordshire Bull Terrier dog, red-brindle brown coat with white chest and white stripe on the muzzle, white paws, black collar with brass studs, stocky muscular build, happy expression with tongue out

name: James
description: James: 6-year-old boy with straight mid-brown hair with a fringe, dark brown eyes, cheeky warm smile, green T-shirt with cartoon dog print, white shorts, black sneakers with orange laces; Nicolas's best friend from Riverside school, exactly the SAME height as Nicolas

name: Bella
description: Bella: 8-year-old girl with very long straight light-brown hair, blue-grey eyes, bright friendly smile, small shell earrings, cream sweatshirt, blue-grey shorts, pink sneakers; James's big sister, slightly taller than the boys

name: Eva
description: Eva: adult woman with light-brown hair slicked back into a neat low bun, shaped dark eyebrows, blue-grey eyes, soft gentle smile with mauve lips, white ribbed tank top with a thin blue-striped trim, blue-and-white pinstriped skirt, small gold wristwatch, slim medium height

name: Jakob
description: Jakob: adult man with short slightly wavy mid-brown hair, bright blue eyes, light brown stubble, big warm friendly smile, plain white T-shirt, slim tall build
